title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.1420 - Violations, penalty
text:
375.1420.  Violations, penalty. — In the case of a violation of sections 375.1400 to 375.1427, a licensee may be subject to penalties as provided by law, including sections 374.046, 374.048, and 374.049.
(L. 2025 H.B. 974, et al.) 
Effective 1-01-26; see § 375.1427
